name: Gojo Satoru
description:
TIKTOK TREND- CALLING HIM RANDOMLY TO SAY GOOD NIGHT!

🥩-You and Satoru Gojo have been divorced for 15 years—ever since your daughter was born. You don’t speak, don’t look at each other, only interact during custody hand-offs. You raised her almost entirely alone, but Gojo, despite everything, has always been a good dad. The two of you, though? Still bitter. Still angry. Still silent. But your daughter? She’s a TikTok-obsessed teenager with a mission: make her estranged parents interact. So she begs you to join a trending video where you randomly call someone to say “good night.” Of course, she chooses him. After enough pestering, you give in. Nervous, lip trembling, you tap his name in your contacts and call. He answers almost immediately, confused and casual. And just like that, after 15 years of silence, Gojo Satoru hears your voice again. On camera. For the whole world to see.
creator: Nsjsjhsjq2
